summary: Provider Pressure + Business Metrics testing completed. Backend APIs working correctly (87.5% pass rate). Frontend pages accessible but Playwright automation encountered browser issues during login flow.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns {success: true, stats: {...}} instead of {count: 1, providers: [...]} format
minor_bugs.impact: Response format inconsistency - doesn't match bulk recompute endpoint format
minor_bugs.workaround: Frontend can handle both formats or use the stats object directly

testing_issues.issue: Playwright browser automation stuck at 'Loading...' state during login - API call returns ERR_ABORTED in browser
testing_issues.note: Backend API works correctly (verified via curl and Python requests). Issue appears to be browser-specific or CORS-related in Playwright context.

untested_due_to_login_issue.reason: Could not complete login flow in Playwright to access authenticated pages
untested_due_to_login_issue.manual_verification: Pages are accessible (HTTP 200) and backend APIs return correct data

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/auth/login - returns JWT token with correct credentials
✅ GET /api/admin/metrics - returns 3 metrics (conversion, avg_order_time, repeat_rate) with correct structure
✅ GET /api/providers/me/stats - returns current user's provider stats (score, tier, metrics)
✅ GET /api/admin/providers/stats - returns list of providers sorted by score desc with enriched data (providerName, providerEmail)
✅ POST /api/admin/providers/stats/recompute - recomputes all providers and returns count
✅ Backend smoke test script (/app/backend/test_provider_pressure.py) passes all 6 checks per main agent's note

success_percentage.frontend: Unable to complete due to Playwright login issue
success_percentage.overall: Backend fully functional, frontend pages exist and are accessible

action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Review single provider recompute endpoint response format for consistency with bulk recompute. 2. Investigate Playwright/browser login issue (ERR_ABORTED on /api/auth/login) - may be CORS, CSP, or Cloudflare-related. Backend API works correctly via curl/requests. 3. Verify frontend pages render correctly: /admin/business-metrics should show 3 metric cards (Конверсія рахунків, Середній час виконання, Повторність клієнтів) with refresh button. /admin/provider-health should show tier distribution (5 badges) and providers table with recompute button. 4. Verify sidebar 'Control' group contains 'Бізнес-метрики' and 'Provider Pressure' menu items (admin role only).

notes.backend_functionality: All Provider Pressure APIs are working correctly. The engine computes score/tier based on response time, completion rate, and activity. Tier thresholds match spec (80-100=high, 60-79=normal, 40-59=warning, 20-39=penalized, <20=hidden). Formula: response×0.3 + completion×0.4 + activity×0.3 − latePenalty.
notes.metrics_api: GET /api/admin/metrics returns exactly 3 KPIs as specified: conversion (paid/sent invoices), avg_order_time (hours between created_at → completedAt), repeat_rate (customers with 2+ orders / total customers). All metrics have correct sub-fields.
notes.data_state: Test environment has minimal data (0 invoices, 0 orders, 1 provider with score=0/tier=hidden). This is expected for a fresh deployment. Metrics return 0 values but structure is correct.
notes.frontend_routes: Both /admin/business-metrics and /admin/provider-health routes are registered in App.js and return HTTP 200. Components exist and are properly imported.
notes.sidebar_integration: Layout.js includes 'control' group (id: 'control', labelKey: 'control') with two items: {path: '/admin/business-metrics', label: 'Бізнес-метрики'} and {path: '/admin/provider-health', label: 'Provider Pressure'}. Visible only to master_admin and admin roles.
